CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Continued To Mar-22-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith facts in support of malice, oppression or fraud to support the request for punitive damages recoverable per the causes of action alleged (breach of contract; stature breach of warranty of habitability).

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to comply with CRC 2.112 as to the purportedly asserted causes of action for breach of contract and statutory breach of warranty of habitability (Opposition 2: 9-14) and to allege facts in support of each element of these two causes of action.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Continued To Feb-08-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
